3008700.name: Eagle Knight Paradox
3008700.description:
Eagle Knight Paradox is a story-driven action-adventure that blends high-speed mecha battles with slice-of-life exploration. Step into the neon-lit city of Comala 88, where every choice you make will shape not only the fate of the city but also the lives of the people you meet.

By day, live as Ian — walk the streets, forge bonds, and witness how the scars of war ripple through everyday life. By night, climb into your towering combat mecha and face colossal enemies in frantic, skill-based battles.

Your mission is clear: protect the city at all costs. But the lines blur when personal connections collide with duty. Will you stay true to the mission, or risk everything for the people you care about?

Eagle Knight Paradox redefines action-adventure with a unique balance of heartfelt storytelling and explosive combat, giving players a fresh and unforgettable experience.
